german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German proficiency, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core and Customer-facing PMs Dominate Equally
pm_type.subtitle: Balanced representation indicates no significant preference for one PM type over the other.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With over half of positions classified as senior, the market favors experienced professionals.

work_mode.title: Fragmented Work Modes Indicate Uncertainty in Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remain unclassified, highlighting mixed expectations for remote and on-site work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 32% of roles require AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
